trading_cells.configuration.title: Trading Cells Config
message.trading_cells.villager_inserted: Villager inserted into the trading cell.
message.trading_cells.villager_extracted: Villager moved back into the capturer.
message.trading_cells.villager_released: Villager released from the trading cell.
message.trading_cells.cell_occupied: This trading cell already contains a mob.
message.trading_cells.capturer_occupied: This capturer already contains a mob.
message.trading_cells.invalid_villager: The stored villager data is invalid.
message.trading_cells.no_trades: This villager has no available trades.
message.trading_cells.piglin_inserted: Piglin inserted into the trading cell.
message.trading_cells.piglin_extracted: Piglin moved back into the capturer.
message.trading_cells.piglin_released: Piglin released from the trading cell.
message.trading_cells.piglin_no_trades: Piglins cannot trade from this trading cell.
message.trading_cells.wrong_capturer: Use the matching capturer for the mob stored in this cell.
message.trading_cells.poi_extracted: POI removed from the trading cell.
message.trading_cells.poi_occupied: This trading cell already has a POI.
message.trading_cells.poi_empty: This trading cell has no POI.
message.trading_cells.inventory_full: You need one free inventory slot.
message.trading_cells.poi_locked_by_prof: This villager already has a persistent profession, so the POI cannot replace it.
message.trading_cells.trades_reset_locke: This villager already has a fixed profession, so trades cannot be reset.
message.trading_cells.trades_reset_unava: Trade reset is not available for this merchant.
message.trading_cells.invalid_piglin: The stored piglin data is invalid.
message.trading_cells.piglin_barter_fail: This piglin did not return any barter item.
message.trading_cells.piglin_barter_hint: Use a gold ingot on this cell to barter with the stored piglin.
message.trading_cells.use_piglin_barteri: Use the piglin bartering cell for captured piglins.
